data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attendee itinerary generation and reminders.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Attendee itinerary generation and reminders', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for attendee itinerary generation, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this aspect. This indicates a clear gap in the saga lifecycle regarding the necessary validation of attendee itineraries and reminders.
gaps: No evidence of attendee itinerary generation and reminders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement itinerary generation and reminder system
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that itineraries are generated and reminders are sent to attendees.
